---
name: Feature Request / 功能请求
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement / 提出新功能或改进建议
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / 问题

What problem does this feature solve? Why is it needed?
<!-- 这个功能解决什么问题？为什么需要？ -->

## Proposed Solution / 建议方案

Describe the solution you'd like.
<!-- 描述你期望的方案。 -->

## Alternatives Considered / 考虑过的替代方案

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.
<!-- 你考虑过的其他方案或变通方法。 -->

## Use Case / 使用场景

Describe a concrete use case where this feature would be useful.
<!-- 描述一个具体场景说明此功能的用途。 -->

## Additional Context / 补充信息

Any other context, mockups, or references.
<!-- 其他上下文、原型或参考。 -->
